dsl:
schema: "recorder.config/v1"
session_id: "browser-preview-stream-matrix"
destination_templates:
  per_source: "recordings/{session_id}/{source_name}.{ext}"
video_sources:
  - id: "desktop-1"
    name: "Full Desktop"
    type: "display"
    enabled: true
    target:
      display: ":0"
    settings:
      capture:
        fps: 24
        cursor: true
        follow_resize: false
      output:
        container: "mov"
        video_codec: "h264"
        quality: 75
    destination_template: "per_source"
